messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences. Watch for tickets that are polite on the surface but negative underneath, and for ambiguous categories — escalate (needs_human=true) when unsure.

Subject: Automations tab missing on mobile

On the iOS app I don't see the Automations tab that the release notes mention. Web has it. Is mobile support coming or am I missing a setting?

response.content: {"category":"automation","priority":"low","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Automations are web-only in this release — the iOS app will get the tab in an upcoming update. Rules you create on web still run for everyone, including mobile users."}
